name: Free Solitaire
short_description: Free solitaire collection, no ads. 120+ variants.
detailed_description:
Free solitaire collection, no ads. 120+ variants.

Highly customizable.

You can create you own card sets from pictures, GIF-animations and videos with the in-built editor.

Check the community-run Discord server for player-made card sets and other content.

Solitaire variants:

  • Popular: Klondike (+ by Threes), Spider (1, 2, 4 suits), FreeCell, Pyramid, TriPeaks

  • Klondike family: Westcliff, Blind Alleys, Double Klondike, Thirty-Six, Whitehead, Ultra Klondike (3, 4 decks), Legion, Steps, Aunt Mary, Batsford, King Albert, Raglan, EastHaven, Double EastHaven, Somerset, Carlton, Milligan Harp

  • FreeCell family: Eight off, Power, Penguin, Big/Easy/Difficult Free Cell, Baker's Game (+ 2-decks)

  • Spider family: Mini-Spider, Wasp, Scorpion, Simple Simon, Easy Spider, Friendly Spider, Scarab

  • Pairing games: Thirteen, Doublets, Fourteens, Perpetual Motion, Monte Carlo, Vertical, Wish, Golf

  • Carpet family: Carpet, Colorado, Twenty / Sly Fox

  • Fan family: Fan, House in the Woods, House on the Hill, Buffalo Bill, Little Billee, Bristol, Flower Garden, Brigade, Stonewall, Intelligence, Scotch Patience

  • Bisley family: Martha, Martha+, Castles in Spain, Spanish Patience, Caprice, Baker's Dozen, Portuguese Solitaire, Good Measure, Bisley, Blockade

  • Canfield/Demon family: Acme, Canfield/Demon, American Toad, Duke, Gate, Rainbow, Chameleon

  • Two Deck games: Squadron, Backbone, Royal Aids, Kingdom, Alternation (+ easy version), Alhambra

  • Forty Thieves family: Forty Thieves, Busy Aces, Courtyard, Lucas, Triple Line, Waning Moon, Number Ten, Napoleon's Exile, Diplomat, Fortune's Favor, Limited, Midshipman, Streets, Corona, Lady Palk, Forty and Eight, Forty-Nine, Single Rail, Double Rail, Maria, Red and Black, Giant

  • Sir Tommy family: Sir Tommy, Tam O'Shanter, Auld Lang Syne

  • Castle family: Avenue, Congress, Beleaguered Castle, Citadel, Streets and Alleys, Fortress

  • Yukon family: Yukon, Open Yukon, Window Blinds, Slope, Russian Solitaire
